articles.title: Zudio, Trends: Budget fast fashion is taking small-town India by storm - BBC
articles.description: More Indians in small towns are now shopping for affordable brands instead of unlabelled goods in the bazaars.
articles.content: In these outlets, most merchandise costs between $4 (£2.90) and $15. "Plus, the designs are contemporary and there's a growing desire among people to wear branded clothes," Pankaj Kumar, a retail ana… [+51 chars]
